scenes.headline: The Rise of Visibility in Hospitality
scenes.vo: Welcome to 'The Rise of Visibility in Hospitality'. A new era where being seen is just as crucial as being booked.

scenes.heading: Key Insights from 2026

items.title: The Death of Blue Links in Hospitality

scenes.vo: Let's dive into the key insights from our 2026 analysis, uncovering the shift in hotel distribution strategies.

scenes.label: Hotels Appearing in AI-Generated Recommendations
scenes.vo: A significant 16% increase in bookings is attributed to pre-journey visibility, a game-changer for the industry.

scenes.heading: **Why Visibility Matters**
scenes.vo: **Why Visibility Matters**: In an answer-based internet, hotels must be cited by AI systems, own accurate data, and convert agent-driven discovery into bookings.

scenes.quote: **Being Understood Matters More Than Being Ranked**
scenes.vo: **Being Understood Matters More Than Being Ranked**. Accuracy in AI-driven recommendations is key to winning the booking.

scenes.label: Hotels Without True AI Booking Agents
scenes.vo: 89% of travelers make decisions based on information found outside traditional booking channels, emphasizing the need for broad visibility.

scenes.title: **Adaptation Strategies**
scenes.vo: **Adaptation Strategies**: Unlike Walmart's 1/3 conversion rate with Instant Checkout, hotels must master dynamic, accurate, AI-driven listings.

scenes.heading: **Action Items for Hotels**
scenes.vo: **Action Items for Hotels**: Invest in AI compatibility, streamline data, and ensure vendor stacks support multi-surface bookings.

scenes.headline: Stay Ahead in Hospitality with **The Inference**
scenes.vo: Stay Ahead in Hospitality with **The Inference**. Navigate the visibility revolution with insights that drive your strategy forward.
